description: The settlement record that pays a supplier (or cash handler) against a matched, approved invoice or an acknowledged PO advance term. It owns the payment schedule, the maker/checker release gate, the withholding/advance/retention netting, and the running paid/upcoming/overdue breakdown that is written back onto the ticket. One Payment aggregates many Installments; it is the SettlementRecord that closes the procure-to-pay loop.
lifecycleEnum: derived from child Installment statuses (InstallmentStatus); Payment itself has no own status enum, status is computed from installments

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Payment Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties the payment back to its invoice/PO and forward to the creditor ledger and analytics so every disbursement is traceable to one payable. Immutability mirrors the requisition identifier rule (axiom A1) for the settlement leg.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: supplier must exist; ONBOARDED at PO time; read-only after creation
fields.purpose: Names the payee so the release destination, the per-supplier creditor ledger, and payables aging all attribute the disbursement to the right party. The pivot for DPO and creditor-aging analytics.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the payment settles against a PO (credit/advance track); null on a cash-float buy which has no PO reference
fields.validation: PO exists; null only permitted for the cash-float track
fields.purpose: Links the payment to the order it settles, enabling commitment relief, advance recoupment against that PO, and order-thread confirmation to the supplier. Null is the explicit marker of the no-PO cash branch.

fields.name: invoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when triggered by a matched invoice (diagram 09); null when triggered by a PO advance term at acknowledgement (diagram 05) or a cash buy
fields.validation: invoice exists and is matched/approved when present
fields.purpose: Ties the payment to the matched payable so GR/IR clears and the three-way/two-way reconciliation is closed by the disbursement. Absent for advance terms that are paid before any invoice exists.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; inherited from the invoice/PO
fields.purpose: The disbursement currency; the base-currency siblings of every amount are FX-converted from it so release thresholds and aging analytics are normalized (axiom A12). Drives realized FX gain/loss between PO date and payment date.

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.label: Payment Total
fields.validation: = sum of agreed installment amounts in the schedule
fields.purpose: The full payable value the schedule must settle; the denominator for the paid/upcoming/overdue/pending breakdown. Recomputed on any schedule edit while the schedule is still editable.

fields.name: totalAmountPaid
fields.label: Amount Paid
fields.validation: recomputed live on each request, never cached
fields.purpose: The settled portion; written back to Ticket.totalAmountPaid for the ticket-level payment progress and DPO. Paid is the sum of approvedAmount across PROCESSED installments only.

fields.name: upcomingPaymentAmount
fields.label: Upcoming Amount
fields.validation: recomputed live; a null installment date is treated as upcoming, not overdue
fields.computedFormula: SUM(installment.amount WHERE status != PROCESSED AND (date >= start-of-today OR date IS NULL)) + max(0, totalAmount - totalAmountPaid - overduePaymentAmount) shortfall
fields.purpose: The not-yet-due payable shown on the ticket and the cash-flow forecast. Pending shortfall (totalAmount minus paid not covered by scheduled entries) is added here so the forecast never under-states what remains.

fields.name: overduePaymentAmount
fields.label: Overdue Amount
fields.validation: overdue boundary is 00:00:00 start-of-today (no timezone handling); recomputed live
fields.computedFormula: SUM(installment.amount WHERE status != PROCESSED AND date < start-of-today)
fields.purpose: The past-due payable that drives the overdue reminder and creditor-aging buckets; written to Ticket.overduePaymentAmount. The start-of-today boundary is a fixed rule so the figure is deterministic.

fields.name: withholdingTaxCodeId
fields.label: Withholding Tax Code
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when withholding (TDS/WHT) applies, i.e. cross-border services
fields.purpose: Selects the withholding rate/jurisdiction so the withheld portion is computed correctly and remitted to the authority separately from the supplier net release.

fields.name: withholdingTaxAmount
fields.label: Withholding Tax
fields.validation: >= 0; remitted to the authority separately, not to the supplier
fields.purpose: The tax withheld at source on the payment; it reduces the supplier net release and is paid to the tax authority. First term in the net-release netting (net = approvedAmount - withholding - advance recouped - retention withheld).

fields.name: advanceRecoupedAmount
fields.label: Advance Recouped
fields.validation: >= 0; cannot exceed the outstanding AdvancePayment balance for the PO
fields.purpose: Recovers a prior prepayment asset against this invoice by reducing the cash released; moves the linked AdvancePayment toward recouped. Second netting term before release.

fields.name: retentionWithheldAmount
fields.label: Retention Withheld
fields.validation: >= 0; = configured retention percent of the gross release
fields.purpose: Holds back a configured percentage released only on acceptance or after the warranty period; creates/links a Retention record. Third netting term before release.

fields.name: netReleaseAmount
fields.label: Net Release
fields.validation: >= 0; the figure the checker releases and the maker processes
fields.purpose: The cash actually disbursed after all netting; what the checker approves to pay and the maker pays. Keeps the gross payable, the statutory withholding, the prepayment recovery, and the holdback distinct in one number.

fields.name: purchaseChannel
fields.label: Payment Channel
fields.validation: cash routes the cash-float track (no PO); credit/advance route the installment approval track
fields.purpose: Routes the settlement: cash buys run on the petty-cash float with no PO reference, credit/advance run through the maker/checker installment pipeline. Drives the cash-vs-credit unified spend report.

fields.name: destination
fields.label: Release Destination
fields.validation: supplier -> email confirmation on order thread; cashHandler -> float top-up
fields.purpose: Splits the post-process action: a supplier release emails the confirmation on the order thread, a cash-handler release (a float reimbursement) tops the float back to its ceiling.

fields.name: realizedFxGainLoss
fields.label: Realized FX Gain/Loss
fields.validation: computed between PO-date rate and payment-date rate; graceful degradation to 0 on FX failure
fields.purpose: Captures the currency movement between commitment and settlement so finance can report realized FX gain/loss; a by-product of base-currency normalization (axiom A12).

invariants: A6 SoD maker != checker, no self-release
A9 schedule lock + one remainder per partial
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
